div.p: Manage your account, instances, and billing from here.
Your trial instance is currently on the plan (Free Trial). Configure your resources below to keep your data and instance running.

ul.li: Your data and configuration are preserved

div.p: Secure payment powered by SSL encryption
Adjust your resources. Upgrades take effect immediately. Worker reductions take effect at your next billing cycle.

Your plan will change to
() at the end of your billing cycle
() .

button.data-confirm: Cancel the scheduled change and keep your current plan?

div.div:
Worker reduction will take effect at your next billing cycle
()
Storage cannot be reduced below current allocation (GB)

div.p: Reactivate with the same subdomain and domain.

Configure your plan and pay the invoice to reactivate. Your instance will be redeployed empty — your most recent snapshot is kept safely. Once the instance is running, open the Snapshots page, re-enable Daily Backups (one-time activation invoice includes a small retention surcharge), and click Restore to bring your data back yourself. No support ticket needed.

Daily snapshots of your full instance for . Captures every database, your uploaded files, your custom modules and your instance settings on each run; keeps up to 7 most recent snapshots (the oldest is dropped automatically). Billed as a flat monthly fee with no proration — the same amount is charged whether you enable on the 1st or the 28th. Charged again on every renewal while the feature is on.

tr.td:
Daily Backups Add-on Monthly
Flat monthly fee — no proration. Once enabled, the next charge is one full month after today's payment.

div.p:
Invoice: . You can pay any time from
the invoice page
too.
